channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Clippers dominate fourth quarter in win over Jazz
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - The Los Angeles Clippers broke open a close game in the fourth quarter, outscoring the Jazz 36-24, en route to a 130-110 win over Utah Saturday night. Jordan Clarkson led the Jazz with 24 points, while Keyonte George added 21 off the bench.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Wanna get away? Sharks blasted by Dallas Stars in final game before break
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks outclassed by Dallas Stars, enter 4 Nations Face-Off break having lost 10 of 11 games.
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Canada beats US 3-1 in Game 5 to win the Rivalry Series women's hockey showcase
item.description: SUMMERSIDE, Prince Edward Island (AP) — Jennifer Gardiner broke a tie with 6:44 left and Canada beat the United States 3-1 on Saturday night to win the Rivalry Series women's hockey showcase for the third straight time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Curry scores 34 points, Butler adds 25 in Golden State debut as Warriors rally to beat Bulls 132-111
item.description: Stephen Curry scored 34 points and tied a season high with eight 3-pointers, Jimmy Butler added 25 points in his Golden State debut and the Warriors rallied to beat the Chicago Bulls 132-111.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Seligman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lakhin scores 22, Clemson defeats No. 2 Duke 77-71 to snap Blue Devils' 16-game winning streak
item.description: CLEMSON, S.C. (AP) — Viktor Lakhin scored 22 points, Clemson held player of the year candidate Cooper Flagg in check for most of the game and the Tigers defeated No. 2 Duke 77-71 on Saturday night to snap the Blue Devils’ 16-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Anthony Davis leaves his Dallas debut with an injury after seismic Luka Doncic trade
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis left in the third quarter with a lower-body injury and didn't return in his debut with the Dallas Mavericks on Saturday after the seismic trade that sent Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants great Victor Cruz speaks highly of Saquon Barkley's drive for greatness despite being on Eagles
item.description: New York Giants legend Victor Cruz gave his flowers to Philadelphia Eagles star running back Saquon Barkley, whose drive for greatness inspires him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Devin Booker's 47 points leads Suns past Jazz in OT
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored a season-high 47 points, Grayson Allen hit a 3-pointer at the buzzer to force overtime and the short-handed Phoenix Suns rallied to beat the Utah Jazz 135-127 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ben Simmons waived by the Nets after the team and former No. 1 pick agree to a buyout
item.description: Ben Simmons has been waived by the Brooklyn Nets after the team agreed to a buyout with the last remaining link to a failed era of building around All-Stars.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: SDCC coach battles cancer while coaching
item.description: Jose Martinez's whole life is basketball, from playing on the Puerto Rican national team at 15 years old, to becoming an assistant coach at San Diego City College.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Increased security in New Orleans ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: More than 125,000 visitors — including President Donald Trump — are expected to converge on the Big Easy this week.
item.dc:creator: Xavier Walton, NewsNation

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Bevan Brothers Commit to Colorado Mesa
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Two brothers from Plateau Valley High School are taking the next step in their athletic careers, and they won’t have to go far to do it. Jackson and Heston Bevan, both standout multi-sport athletes, are staying close to home.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: 70 Illinois residents can win Las Vegas vacation with Rosati's Pizza
item.description: Illinois residents can enter the Rosati's Pizza sweepstakes and win a three-day, two-night vacation at the Circa Resort and Casino in Las Vegas, with the contest closing on the day of the Big Game.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: NFL stops 'End Racism' message in Super Bowl end zone
item.description: The end zones will include the phrases "Choose Love" and "It Takes All of Us" for the game at the Caesars Superdome.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers legend Steve Young believes football was made for girls
item.description: ATHERTON, Calif. - Steve Young is fully invested in one of Silicon Valley's newest startups - girls flag football. Whether it's the size of the field. "The front line you don't see. You see the cone here? Every first down is a cone." The size of the ball.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: Tiger Woods' mother, Kultida Woods, has died
item.description: Kultida Woods, the Thai-born mother of Tiger Woods, died Tuesday morning, a week after being seen attending his indoor TMRW Golf League in Florida.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON AP Golf Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Big 12 Conference unveils 2025 schedule, Utah and BYU to meet in October
item.description: It's a big day for college football fans as the Big 12 Conference released the full 2025 season schedule which includes the schedules for the Utah Utes and the BYU Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Cooper Kupp says the Rams intend to trade him. He's disappointed to end his 8 years with the team
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Receiver Cooper Kupp says the Los Angeles Rams are attempting to trade him after eight seasons with the club, and he doesn't like the decision.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Report: Bears GM Ryan Poles expected to receive 3-year contract extension, according to team source
item.description: The Bears are expected to extend general manager Ryan Poles' contract for three more years, in order to align it with the contract signed by new head coach Ben Johnson, according to a feature story this week by ESPN Bears reporter Courtney Cronin. Cronin published a feature story Monday at ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Major League Baseball fires ump amid gambling probe
item.description: Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, WGN 9

item.title: MLB ump fired amid gambling probe
item.description: Major League Baseball has fired an umpire as part of an investigation into sports gambling. Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball, according to ESPN reporter Jesse Rogers and later confirmed by the league.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Doncic releases emotional farewell message to Dallas after trade sends him to Lakers
item.description: Luka Doncic released an emotional farewell to Dallas on Sunday, the same day a trade sending him from the Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers in a swap for fellow All-NBA player Anthony Davis was finalized.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cade Cunningham's 22 points and 15 assists lead Pistons over Bulls 127-119
item.description: Cade Cunningham had 22 points and 15 assists as the Detroit Pistons defeated the Chicago Bulls 127-119 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Iowa honors Caitlin Clark by retiring her number and hanging it in the rafters
item.description: Clark returned to Iowa’s Carver-Hawkeye Arena on Sunday to have her number 22 retired in a ceremony after the Hawkeyes’ 76-67 win over No. 4 USC, one season after she completed her historic college career.
item.dc:creator: JOHN BOHNENKAMP, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DeWanna Bonner will join the Indiana Fever, AP source says
item.description: DeWanna Bonner is headed to Indiana to join Caitlin Clark and the Fever, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5
